reasoning: The composited element is a large warm beige/tan panel with pixel art icons, positioned center-frame. Locatability is strong — high contrast against the dark teal and grey tile backgrounds means it is spotted immediately. It is clearly distinct from all background tiles. However, integration is poor on several dimensions: (1) The warm beige hue clashes with the game's predominantly cool dark palette (teal HUD, dark grey stone, muted greens); (2) The element reads as a tooltip popup or inventory panel rather than an action button — the interior pixel icons reinforce this misread; (3) At this scale it dominates the scene and draws attention away from the actual gameplay elements like the monster and pressure plate; (4) The flat, bright face sits visually 'above' the game world rather than embedded in it, giving a pasted-on feel. Silhouette is readable but the UI-overlay impression undermines Echoes cleanliness.
